description: Letter from Yosef ha-Talmud b. Yishay ha-Sar. In Hebrew. Complaining that the addressee has not fulfilled his vow to give Yosef sum of money in gold; Yosef has only received 10 silver coins. "What is my sin, that you have not fulfilled your vow?" He complains about hunger and poverty and asks for the money. In the margin he mentions at least one parnas.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
